nodes.name: Upload Voice Over Script Ensure Double Space In between Scenes And Select Voice
Formats Output For Scenes And Voice
Send Video Generation Request To FastAPI of app_v3.py

json.Script (one line per scene):
Ramadan is here, and every year we make the same quiet promise to ourselves: this Ramadan will be different. But different how?

What if this Ramadan was more than rituals, more than hunger, more than schedules and exhaustion disguised as productivity, but something deeper?

What if it was a sacred rehabilitation center for your entire being, not just fasting from food but resetting your heart, rebuilding your soul, rewiring your mind, and retraining your body?

This year we begin a four-week journey called Ramadan Reset: Aligning Your Heart, Soul, Mind and Body, not another reminder series, but a guided transformation.

Week One is the heart, where we release grudges, heal silent pain, and remove spiritual rust that weighs us down.

Week Two is the soul, where we move from performance to presence and from routine to real relationship with Allah.

Week Three is the mind, where we challenge the voice that says I am not enough and rewrite the internal scripts that keep us spiritually stuck.

Week Four is the body, where we honor fasting as discipline, balance, and mastery, not just endurance.

Because Ramadan is not meant to exhaust you, it is meant to refine you, so do not just scroll through Ramadan, journey through it.

Follow the blog, turn on notifications, and walk this path with us, because this Ramadan we are not just fasting, we are resetting. 🌙
